prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约21403→18885→18113→23461，2025年因四川首年新高考（物理类/历史类）出现较大波动，位次后移约5348名；2025年基准约2 3461名；该校在四川理科/物理类计划2022年156人、2023年163人、2024年160人、2025年166人；2026年物理类计划175人，较2025年扩招9人（+5.4%）， 扩招幅度明显，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第73名，较2025年（第67名）小幅下滑6位，整体排名仍属中上 水平，在理工类院校中具有较强竞争力；该校近年声誉平稳，未出现在学校声誉及投档异常文件中，无明显负面舆情；抖音热度未进入总排名前100，短视频平 台关注度一般，报考热度未出现异常波动；石油与天然气工程为该校王牌学科（第四轮学科评估A+），化学工程与技术、地质资源与地质工程等学科实力突出， 与招生专业中的石油工程、油气储运工程、化工与制药类等高度对应，对相关专业报考有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 能源动力类专业（含石油工程、新能源等）2024年 专业热度评估为"推荐"，社会关注度偏热；计算机类、电气工程等热门专业持续高热；本省2026年考生总数535000人，按近年物理类占比约61.5%估算约329025人， 较2025年物理类284789人增长约15.5%，考生规模大幅增加，竞争显著加剧。；中国石油大学（华东）位于山东青岛，非本省高校 ，无本地招生倾斜；该校在四川招生占比约2%-3%，属中等规模生源省份，跨省报考受地域偏好影响较小。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年新高考首年位次大幅后移的波动、2026年 物理类扩招5.4%的缓解作用、以及本省物理类考生预计增长约15.5%带来的竞争加剧，在2025年基准23461名基础上，预计2026年最低位次小幅前移至约24024名，区间23524–24524 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间23524–24524名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<23524名）可重点冲刺石油工程菁英班、电气工程等王牌专 业；位次在区间中段（约24000名）建议以油气储运、自动化、新能源等二档专业为核心；位次接近区间上限（>24524名）建议优先考虑三档专业并适当扩大保底院校范围。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2022–2025 Science/Physics Category minimum rankings approximately 21403→18885→18113→23461, with significant fluctuation in 2025 due to Sichuan's first year of new Gaokao (Physics Category/History Category), ranking dropped by about 5348 places; 2025 baseline approximately 23461; the university's enrollment plan in Sichuan for Science/Physics Category: 156 in 2022, 163 in 2023, 160 in 2024, 166 in 2025; 2026 Physics Category plan 175, an increase of 9 students (+5.4%) compared to 2025, the expansion is significant, providing some relief to competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking approximately 73rd, slightly down 6 places from 2025 (67th), overall ranking still at mid-to-upper level, strong competitiveness among science and engineering institutions; the university's reputation has been stable in recent years, no abnormal school reputation or enrollment files, no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin popularity not in top 100 overall, short video platform attention average, no abnormal fluctuation in application popularity; Petroleum and Natural Gas Engineering is the university's flagship discipline (A+ in fourth round discipline evaluation), Chemical Engineering and Technology, Geological Resources and Geological Engineering and other disciplines have outstanding strength, highly corresponding to enrollment majors such as Petroleum Engineering, Oil and Gas Storage and Transportation Engineering, Chemical and Pharmaceutical Engineering, providing stable attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Energy and Power majors (including Petroleum Engineering, New Energy, etc.) 2024 major popularity assessment as 'Recommended', social attention slightly hot; Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and other popular majors continue to be very hot; total number of candidates in this province in 2026 is 535,000, estimated about 329,025 based on recent Physics Category proportion of about 61.5%, an increase of about 15.5% compared to 2025 Physics Category 284,789, candidate scale significantly increased, competition significantly intensified; China University of Petroleum (East China) is located in Qingdao, Shandong, not a local university, no local enrollment bias; the university's enrollment proportion in Sichuan is about 2%-3%, a medium-scale source province, cross-province application affected less by regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant ranking drop fluctuation in the first year of new Gaokao in 2025, the relief effect of a 5.4% expansion in Physics Category in 2026, and the intensified competition due to an estimated 15.5% increase in local Physics Category candidates, based on the 2025 baseline of 23461, the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to slightly move forward to about 24024, with a range of 23524–24524.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Petroleum Engineering (Elite Class)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Computer Science and Technology
- Electronic Information Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Oil and Gas Storage and Transportation Engineering
- Automation
- New Energy Science and Engineering
- Software Engineering
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials (Material Forming and Control Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, etc.)
- Building Environment and Energy Application Engineering
- Management Science and Engineering
- English
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 23524–24524, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, sprint for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. Rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<23524) can focus on sprinting for Petroleum Engineering Elite Class, Electrical Engineering and other flagship majors; rankings in the middle of the range (about 24000) suggest focusing on Tier 2 majors such as Oil and Gas Storage and Transportation, Automation, New Energy; rankings close to the upper limit (>24524) suggest prioritizing Tier 3 majors and appropriately expanding the range of safety schools.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2022–2025 minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category: approximately 4076 → 4205 → 3879 → 4250, with recent years fluctuating narrowly within the 3800–4300 range; the 2025 baseline is about 4250, with small fluctuations. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Sichuan: 12 in 2022, 4 in 2023, 8 in 2024, 6 in 2025; the 2026 history category plan is 6, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 73rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, at an upper-middle level, but as a science and engineering institution, its liberal arts programs are relatively average overall. The university's reputation has been stable in recent years with no significant negative public opinion; Douyin attention is average, with no abnormal application heat signals. The university is strong in engineering fields such as petroleum, chemical engineering, and geology, while its liberal arts programs (law, economics, Russian, etc.) have no A-level discipline evaluations, relying mainly on the overall 211 platform advantage.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major's 2024 heat evaluation is 'divergent wait-and-see', with social heat diverging; economics/finance majors' 2024 evaluation is 'divergent wait-and-see', judged by university level. In 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is 535,000, with an estimated 205,975 in the history category based on the recent proportion of about 38.5%, an increase of about 15.7% from 177,978 in 2025, significantly increasing competition. The university is located in Qingdao, Shandong, not a local university, with a small enrollment scale in Sichuan's liberal arts (6 people), making it a marginal source province, with limited impact from cross-provincial application due to regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as unchanged history category enrollment plan, intensified competition due to an estimated 15.7% increase in local history category examinees, and the average attractiveness of the university's liberal arts programs, based on the 2025 baseline of 4250, the 2026 minimum ranking is expected to slightly advance to about 4200, with a range of 3700–4700.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: With rankings within the predicted range of 3700–4700, the university offers very few liberal arts majors (only 3 majors in 2026: Law, Economics, Russian, each recruiting 2 students). It is recommended to aim for Law and Economics as reach targets, with Russian as a safety. Rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<3700) can focus on Law; rankings in the middle of the range (around 4200) can try both Economics and Law; rankings near the upper limit (>4700) are advised to primarily consider Russian and also explore liberal arts majors at other universities.
